'''Ben Sammut''' (born 13 February 1975) is a former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played primarily as a {{rlp|fb}} in the 1990s and 2000s, for [[Gateshead Thunder (1999)|Gateshead Thunder]] and [[Hull FC]] in England, and [[Cronulla-Sutherland Sharks|Cronulla Sharks]] in the [[NRL]].
